prompt: Turn the star icon to a red sun icon.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays a white five-pointed star icon. Replace this star with a red sun icon. The new sun icon should maintain the simple, graphic, and slightly dimensional style characteristic of the icon shown in image 2, suitable for an information graphic.
objects: red sun icon with simple, graphic, and slightly dimensional style
white five-pointed star icon (should not be present)
